source_description: A2A Agent Cards adapter (7th layer, manifests). Residual-gap scope per RQ-05: offline+live signed-card verification, skill-level behavioral probing vs declared skills, auth-enforcement negatives, and a CI exit-code/JSON monitoring contract. Two-class (offline static lint + live conformance probes against MUSTER_A2A_ENDPOINT) behind SpecAdapter; CLI `muster a2a run`. Cedes generic card-schema validation to a2a-tck. v1-extended.
